name: io.example/multi-group-fixture
description: Synthetic test fixture exercising cloister-spec/mcp-tool/v1. Not specific to any real MCP server. The three groups below cover the three shapes the spec needs to demonstrate: prefixed-many-claims, bare-name, and prefixed-single-claim. Real MCP servers may carry richer or more domain-specific group layouts; this vector pins the schema, not the use case.
